MINI MINUTES: Line 9
Judge Pro Tem Rachel Ehrlich, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Terrell Williams.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Byron Showes is present.
Attorney Zeenat Hassan appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of May 09, 2016 is vacated. (501)
